pr.title: feat(llma): make PostHog AI concise when replying in Slack
pr.body: Adds a Slack-only response-style block when slack_thread_context is in the run config.
pr.author: timgl

files.after:
SLACK_RESPONSE_STYLE_PROMPT = """
<slack_response_style>
You are responding in a Slack thread, not the PostHog web app.
</slack_response_style>
""".strip()
